objective: Produce a native repo lane where a single problem_set ingress deterministically emits the canonical packet artifact family, validates it locally, and blocks realization until an authoritative human review decision exists.

in_scope: local validation and admission runner reuse
out_of_scope: mutating kernel authority outside the generated packet root

constraints: Local runtime owns validation, admission, and realization.
All artifact paths must be repo-relative.
Human review remains external and authoritative.
Formatting-only changes must not stale approval basis.
assumptions: The canonical packet root is generated/packets/<packet_id>/.
The packet-file dry-run runner is the admission stage for generated packets.
Trust records may be referenced by digest-attested local files.
acceptance_criteria: The problem_set validates against the ingress schema.
A canonical packet root is emitted under generated/packets.
All required packet artifacts exist and validate.
Local admission emits standard decision, violations, admitted-state, and execution-log artifacts.
Realization remains blocked until packet.review.decision.json exists and is authoritative.
review_criteria: Packet constraints match the local execution boundary.
Trust evidence matches current authority and trust inputs.
No artifact claims effective human approval.
